title: Build swift-cli-codegen-from-traffic — Phase D of scaffold-app-from-web pipeline
description: Swift-pure CLI codegen consuming analyzed traffic from Phase C. Inputs: endpoints.json + payload schema files. Outputs: complete Swift Package at packages/<slug>-cli/ with: Package.swift (composed-hash exec name via wrkstrm-identifier hash-name); Sources/<slug>-cli/Commands.swift (ArgumentParser AsyncParsableCommand per endpoint group); Sources/<slug>-cli/Models.swift (@Generable structs from Phase C); Sources/<slug>-cli/HTTPClient.swift (Foundation URLSession + auth model from Phase C); Sources/<slug>-cli/Auth.swift (cookie/oauth/bearer-token per endpoints.json); Tests/<slug>-cliTests/ (golden tests against captured traffic in Phase B). After codegen, calls SubstrateRegistryVault.upsert(entry) to register the new CLI in the substrate registry. The generated CLI is BOTH a binary AND a library — the binary on PATH for operator invocation, the library imported by the Phase F-generated app for typed data access.
